hero.title: Packers & Movers in Andaman & Nicobar Islands
hero.subtitle: Port Blair and across the islands — 211+ verified movers in Andaman & Nicobar.

intro:
The Andaman & Nicobar Islands are among India's most unique Union Territories, combining a naval base, tourism economy and permanent civilian community in the Bay of Bengal. ShiftIndia connects you with 211+ verified movers in Port Blair, the island chain's main city.

For moves to and from the islands, goods travel by sea from Chennai, Kolkata or Visakhapatnam. Our KYC-verified vendors handle both the island-side local logistics and the mainland coordination for sea-freight container moves.
whyUs: Andaman moves require sea cargo coordination, port handling at Port Blair, and careful moisture-proof packing for the marine environment. Our vendors specialise in island-specific packing techniques, carry ₹5 lakh damage coverage and coordinate with mainland shipping partners.

faqs.q: How much do packers and movers cost in Andaman?
faqs.a: Local moves within Port Blair start at ₹5,000. Moving from mainland India to Andaman via sea freight typically costs ₹25,000–₹50,000+ depending on volume and origin port.

faqs.q: How do goods travel to and from Andaman?
faqs.a: Goods are typically shipped by sea in containers from Chennai, Kolkata or Visakhapatnam. Transit takes 3–5 days by sea. Air cargo is available for urgent small items but costs significantly more.

faqs.q: Is special packing required for Andaman sea-freight moves?
faqs.a: Yes. Marine-grade moisture-proof and corrosion-resistant packing is essential for sea transit. Our vendors use heavy-duty waterproof materials as standard for all island-bound moves.

faqs.q: Can you coordinate door-to-door from mainland to Port Blair?
faqs.a: Yes. We provide full door-to-door service — packing at your mainland home, sea freight to Port Blair, customs clearance and final delivery to your island address.
